name: Fruit Loaf
recipeIngredient: 1/4 cup Red and green candied cherries
recipeInstructions:
Fat grams per serving: Approx. Cook Time: 40 minutes
Preheat oven to 450°F. Cut cherries into quarters and add to nuts and mixed peel. Measure flour, baking powder, sugar and salt into sifter. Sift. Beat eggs until light and fluffy. Add in milk, vanilla, almond extract and shortening. Add fruit to flour and mix well. Make a hole in the dry ingredients and egg mixture. Bake in greased loaf pan, lined with wax paper for 35 minutes at 350°F.
One of mom's recipes, originally came from a neighbor from Newfoundland. It packs well for lunches and is not too sweet or crumbly. It can be spread with jam and served for teatime.
